qa_pair.question: How many tools does the github-insights MCP server expose? Answer with just the number.
What field does get_repo_contributor_stats set to true when GitHub is still computing the stats asynchronously (a 202 Accepted response)?
Does get_repo_traffic_views work with a read-only token, or does it need write access to the repo?
What is the name of the tool that returns an SPDX spec version and package count?
Does this plugin's confirm-echo contract require any field to match another before a write call? Answer yes or no.
